tagline: We live here. We work here. We know pools.

hero.headline: 50 Years of Pools Done Right
hero.subheadline: For half a century, Pool Time Inc. has kept pools sparkling across the Tri-Valley and beyond. We handle the cleaning, repairs, and chemistry so you can skip the work and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> a Team That's Done It All
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to full-scale remodels, Pool Time has been the Tri-Valley's trusted pool experts since 1976. One call handles everything your pool needs.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Skimming, vacuuming, brushing, chemical balancing, and filter cleaning — every week, on schedule. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, chlorinators — our experienced repair team diagnoses and fixes it fast. We also install energy-efficient upgrades to save you money.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Advanced leak detection technology pinpoints the problem fast. We locate and repair leaks in plumbing, shells, and equipment — often the same day.

cards.title: Water Testing & Chemistry
cards.description: Professional water analysis with the BioGuard ALEX system. We dial in your chemistry for crystal-clear water that's gentle on skin and eyes.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Replastering, new tile, coping, decking, and equipment modernization. We transform aging pools into stunning backyard retreats that look brand new.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed residential and commercial pools and spas, built with quality materials and expert craftsmanship from concept to first splash.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We'll schedule a free on-site inspection and provide an honest, no-pressure estimate — usually within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our experienced technicians arrive on schedule and handle it all — cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, and repairs. We've been doing this for 50 years, so nothing surprises us.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool, Worry-Free
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and ready for a swim any day of the week. If anything's not right, we come back and make it right — that's been our promise since 1976.

about.label: Why Tri-Valley Trusts Us
about.headline: 50 Years of Family-Owned Pool Expertise
about.description: Since 1976, Ron and Charity Allen have built Pool Time Inc. into the Tri-Valley's most trusted pool service company. We're the area's only exclusive Platinum BioGuard dealer, our retail store stocks more hard-to-find parts than anyone in the region, and our repair team has more experience than any competitor. We treat every pool like it's our own.

features.title: Locally Owned Since 1976
features.description: Ron and Charity Allen have been serving this community for five decades. We live here, we work here, and our reputation is everything.

features.title: Fully Stocked Retail Store
features.description: Premium BioGuard chemicals, hard-to-find parts, and accessories. Walk in for expert advice and walk out with exactly what your pool needs.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a service visit? We'll come back and make it right at no charge. That's the Pool Time promise — backed by 50 years of integrity.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different, so we quote based on your specific needs. Call for a free estimate — honest pricing is how we've kept customers for 50 years.

guarantee.headline: Our 50-Year Promise to You
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — no questions asked, no extra charge. We've built our reputation on doing right by every customer since 1976, and we're not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on a regular schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent needs like green pools or equipment failures, we offer same-day or next-day response. Call us and we'll find a time that works.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we take care of everything while you're away. You'll always know what was done — we leave detailed notes after every visit.

faqs.question: What makes Pool Time different from other companies?
faqs.answer: We've been at this for 50 years. We're the area's only Platinum BioGuard dealer, our retail store has the largest parts inventory in the region, and our repair department has more experience than anyone. When you call Pool Time, you get experts.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Yes. We service HOAs, apartment complexes, and commercial facilities across the Tri-Valley. Commercial clients get customized maintenance plans tailored to their specific requirements and compliance needs.

faqs.question: Can you help with a pool remodel or new construction?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. From replastering and new tile to complete remodels and brand-new pool construction, our licensed team (C53 & C27) handles projects of every scale. We'll walk you through design options and provide a detailed estimate.

testimonials.name: Byron M.
testimonials.text: They basically took our 40 year old pool and made it like a Vegas resort! Pool Time is the best pool company we have ever worked with.

testimonials.name: Franklin T.
testimonials.text: Pool Time came out and found the leak using an advanced detector device and repaired it the same day! Fast, professional, and thorough.

testimonials.name: Matthew T.
testimonials.text: Call them ASAP for ANY pool problems! Their pool service is top notch too. I would never trust anyone else with my pool work.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Takes Care of Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure estimate from the Tri-Valley's most experienced pool team. We've been doing this for 50 years — let us show you the difference.
